ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is MOU Signed onlu for non-core service lines.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity") && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "MOU Signed") && (ISNULL(MOU_Sign_Date__c))
